headline: Should Ondas’ (ONDS) Profit Surge and Defense Pivot Reshape Its Previously Cautious Investment Narrative?
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Ondas Inc. reported sales of US$50.12 million, up sharply from US$4.25 million a year earlier, and moved from a net loss of US$14.14 million to net income of US$361.25 million, while also lifting its full-year 2026 revenue target to at least US$390 million. Alongside this swing to profitability, Ondas has rapidly expanded into defense and autonomous systems through multiple acquisitions, a large contract backlog, and an AI partnership with Palantir, reshaping...

headline: Why Innodata Is Structured For A 10x Run
summary: Innodata (INOD) might be one of the most overlooked artificial intelligence stocks in the market today. While retail investors pile into premium-priced software platforms, a structural necessity in how AI models are built is handing this legacy data player an unprecedented advantage.

headline: What Nebius CEO Just Said Shows How Quickly the Fed Can Kill the AI Boom

headline: Palantir Arbitration Order Tests Trade Secrets And Long Term Moat
summary: A US District Judge has ordered Palantir Technologies to arbitrate trade secret claims against former engineers who founded rival Percepta AI. The case centers on alleged misuse of confidential information and will now move from federal court to a private arbitration forum. This legal development focuses attention on how Palantir handles data security, intellectual property and competition in AI and data analytics. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PLTR, this ruling adds a fresh legal angle...

headline: The Pentagon Wants 300,000 Drones But China Controls The Magnets
